steps.title: Substitute x = 0 to find the y-intercept
steps.content: The y-intercept occurs where the graph crosses the y-axis, which happens at $x = 0$. Substitute this into the function: $$f(0) = \frac{1}{8}(0) - 5 = -5$$

steps.title: Identify the y-intercept point and select the answer
steps.content: The y-intercept is the point with coordinates $(0, -5)$. That is the correct answer.
